criteria.name: Builds & Compiles
criteria.description: The code compiles, builds, and the project starts without errors. Run the build command and verify it succeeds.

criteria.name: Existing Tests Pass
criteria.description: All pre-existing tests still pass. Run the test suite and confirm no regressions were introduced.

criteria.name: Basic Completeness
criteria.description: All aspects of the prompt are addressed. No partial implementations or TODO comments left behind.
